title: Eliminate global graph rewrites from targeted index persistence
Implement checkpoint-plus-journal recovery, revision-lag observability, and replay bounds for restart behavior
Stop publishing tracked .prism state changes shards and indexes
Validate clone size, startup behavior, signed publish semantics, and runtime-only change history ownership
Enforce executor routing and task-only claim and lifecycle control using executor_class, target_label, allowed_principals, and caller identity-aware runnable filtering

Implement schema-aware semantic merge for refs/prism/** so shared-coordination conflicts are resolved by payload semantics and conflict classification instead of generic Git text merges or blind CAS retry loops.
